---
title: "T1_Euler_fig"
author: "Brooke Sevchik"
date: "2026-05-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r load libraries}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)
library(stringr)

```


```{r load in necessary csv }
t1_qc <- read.csv('/Users/bsevchik/Documents/GitHub/grmpy_opendata/curation/06_QC/data/final_qc/T1-ratings_consensus.csv')

```


```{r violin plot}

# ------------Clean labels -------------
#get rid of trailing or leading spaces
t1_qc <- t1_qc %>%
  mutate(
    qc_determination = qc_determination |>
      str_trim() |>        # removes leading/trailing spaces
      str_squish()         # collapses any double spaces inside
  )

# ------------- Long format -------------
qc_long <- t1_qc %>%
  select(euler_LH, euler_RH, qc_determination) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(euler_LH, euler_RH),
    names_to = "hemisphere",
    values_to = "euler"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    hemisphere = recode(hemisphere, euler_LH = "LH", euler_RH = "RH"),
    # order AFTER cleaning; this won’t create NAs
    qc_determination = fct_relevel(qc_determination, "Fail", "Artifact", "Pass")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(euler), !is.na(qc_determination))

# ------------- Plot -------------
pd <- position_dodge(width = 0.85)

p <- ggplot(qc_long, aes(x = qc_determination, y = euler,
                         fill = hemisphere, color = hemisphere)) +
  geom_violin(position = pd, width = 0.8, alpha = 0.35, trim = FALSE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, position = pd, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.9, color = NA) +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", position = pd,
               shape = 23, size = 2.6, fill = "white") +
  labs(
    x = "QC determination",
    y = "Euler number",
    fill = "Hemisphere",
    color = "Hemisphere",
    title = "Euler Number by QC Determinations"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("LH" = "#1f77b4", "RH" = "lightgreen"),
                    labels = c("LH" = "Left Hemisphere", "RH" = "Right Hemisphere")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Left Hemisphere" = "#1f77b4", "Right Hemisphere" = "lightgreen")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right")

p
ggsave("/Users/bsevchik/Documents/GitHub/transdiagnostic_executive_function/QC/qc_distribution_figs/euler_violin_by_qc_hemisphere.png", p, width = 7.5, height = 4.5, dpi = 300)

ggsave("/Users/bsevchik/projects/EF_final_figures/01_input/fig3_QC/euler_violin_by_qc_hemisphere.pdf", p, device = "pdf", width = 7.5, height = 4.5, dpi = 300)


```

```{r box plot}
# ------------- Box Plot -------------
pd <- position_dodge(width = 0.7)

p_box <- ggplot(qc_long, aes(x = qc_determination, y = euler,
                             fill = hemisphere)) +
  geom_boxplot(position = pd, width = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.85) +
  labs(
    x = "QC determination",
    y = "Euler number",
    fill = "Hemisphere",
    title = "Euler Number by QC Determinations"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("LH" = "#1f77b4", "RH" = "lightgreen"),
                    labels = c("LH" = "Left Hemisphere", "RH" = "Right Hemisphere")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right",
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),   # add x/y axis lines
    panel.border = element_blank()
  )

p_box

ggsave("/Users/bsevchik/Documents/GitHub/transdiagnostic_executive_function/QC/qc_distribution_figs/euler_box_by_qc_hemisphere.png", p_box, width = 7.5, height = 4.5, dpi = 300)

ggsave("/Users/bsevchik/projects/EF_final_figures/01_input/fig3_QC/euler_box_by_qc_hemisphere.pdf", p_box, device = "pdf", width = 7.5, height = 4.5, dpi = 300)


```
